current_conditions.site_name: ETOWAH RIVER AT GA 9, NEAR DAWSONVILLE, GA

water_temp_read.read: Water is very warm for trout.

light_pressure_read.read: Light and pressure do not strongly push the outlook either way.

stocking_read.read: Recent stocking supports eggs, worms, and attractor nymphs.

angler_analysis.expected_trout_behavior: Expect trout to favor the most comfortable feeding lanes while staying close to cover when light is high.
angler_analysis.presentation_style: Prioritize clean drifts, smaller natural patterns, and stocked-trout attractors where appropriate.

fly_reasoning.egg_pattern: Recent stocking makes eggs a logical confidence fly.
fly_reasoning.squirmy_worm: A simple stocked-trout attractor and good dirty-water option.
fly_reasoning.duracell: A strong attractor nymph when fish will move a little but are not fully aggressive.

caution_notes: Warm water may increase trout stress.

generated_text.quick_read: Trout fishing on the Etowah River is tough due to very warm water. Recent stocking provides some opportunity using eggs, worms, and attractor nymphs.
generated_text.best_window: Day 2 morning is the best fishing window because light and pressure are neutral, allowing a balanced nymph approach. Additionally, recent stocking increases trout activity near cover and comfortable feeding lanes.
generated_text.current_conditions: Water temperature is very warm at 80.6°F, flow is 97.7 cfs, gage height is 3.69 ft, and turbidity is moderately low at 7.1 NTU.
generated_text.weather_setup: Sky cover is low averaging 20%, pressure is steady at 30.05 inHg with an unknown trend, and wind is light from the west averaging 4.7 mph with gusts up to 16.1 mph. No rain is expected.
generated_text.what_this_means: Trout are likely holding in cold-water refuges, oxygenated spots, runs, seams, and near structure to avoid stress from warm water. Present flies with clean drifts using smaller natural patterns and stocked-trout attractors. Exercise caution as warm water may increase trout stress and reduce feeding activity.
